title: burchardia aromatica
intro: Burchardia aromatica, commonly known as sea blite or sea onion, is a perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits including reducing congestion and coughs, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Burchardia aromatica is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
